name: Green Beans with Red Onion and Olives
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into thirds
5 brine-cured black olives, pitted and sliced thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the onion, vinegar, salt, and olive oil. Let the mixture stand.
2. In a steamer set over boiling water, steam the beans, covered, for 7 to 8 minutes, or until they are just tender. Add them to the bowl while they are still hot and toss well with the olives.
